name: Coldwater Memorial Park
description: Coldwater Memorial Park is a place to play pickleball in Coldwater, OH. There are 9 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.

name: Fort Recovery Community Park
description: Fort Recovery Community Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fort Recovery, OH. There are 2 outdoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. Amenities include lights.

name: Grand Lake Health/Premier Health North YMCA
description: Grand Lake Health/Premier Health North YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Celina, OH. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: St. Henry Park
description: St. Henry Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in St. Henry, OH. There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.
